children.name: p
children.textContent: The best time to learn is right before you use it. Your brain encodes knowledge 40% better when context matches application.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Concepts resurface in new real-world contexts

children.name: p
children.textContent: Instead of re-reading that doc, close it after each section and summarize aloud or in writing.

children.name: p
children.textContent: How well do you remember this?
